description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a hidden job named container_job_template that runs in the containers stage using the docker:latest image and the docker:dind service. In its before_script export TAG="$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE/qemu/$NAME:$QEMU_CI_CONTAINER_TAG" and COMMON_TAG="$CI_REGISTRY/qemu-project/qemu/qemu/$NAME:latest", log in to $CI_REGISTRY with $CI_REGISTRY_USER and $CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD via docker login, and wait for Docker daemon readiness with "until docker info; do sleep 1; done". The script echoes the TAG and COMMON_TAG values, builds the image with "docker build --tag \"$TAG\" --cache-from \"$TAG\" --cache-from \"$COMMON_TAG\" --build-arg BUILDKIT_INLINE_CACHE=1 -f \"tests/docker/dockerfiles/$NAME.docker\" \".\"", and pushes it with "docker push \"$TAG\"". After the script it logs out of Docker with "docker logout". No caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are defined.
